name: Grilled Moroccan Spices with Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onion.
2. Mix olive oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, parsley, ginger, ground cumin, chili powder, sherry, turmeric, dried oregano, cinnamon, and garlic in a large bowl.
3. Divide the marinade mixture between two large shallow baking dishes.
4. Place the flank steak in the marinade, turning to coat evenly.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
6. Grill the steaks to the desired level of doneness (about 8 minutes on each side).
7. Heat the marinade in a saucepan.
8. Cut the steaks diagonally into thin slices.
9. Pour some marinade over the sliced steak.
10. Garnish with cilantro and serve.
